== Notes for [[Item:Q53526|Q53526]] ==

{geni:about_me} HE FOUGHT IN BATTLE OF KURUKSHETRA ON THE KAURAVA SIDE AND WAS KILLED IN BATTLE
<p>--------------------</p>
<p>KILLED IN MAHABHARATA WAR</p>
<p>The family succession of Lav and Kush runs up to the Mahabharat war when Brihadbal was killed by Abhimanyu. This family succession goes further up to Sumitra where the Ikchvaku succession ends. (It’s all described in the ninth canto of the Bhagwatam.)

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
